title: Performance bottleneck diagnosis
summary: Use logs, metrics, traces, and recent deployment context to identify likely bottlenecks and suggest next actions.
description: Helpful outputs include symptom summary, likely cause, supporting evidence, and remediation ideas.
notes: Useful for performance, SRE, incident explanation, and observability demos.

title: Architecture or compliance review
summary: Compare system documents or metadata against a compact rule set and generate findings with remediation suggestions.
description: Helpful outputs include compliant items, violations, missing evidence, and recommended fixes.
notes: Useful for compliance, audit, governance, and architecture assessment demos.

title: Legacy modernization assistant
summary: Summarize legacy artifacts, extract dependencies, infer business function, and generate modernization-ready documentation.
description: Helpful outputs include module summaries, risks, interfaces, and migration recommendations.
notes: Useful for code understanding, documentation, and transformation demos.

title: Social review or feedback analysis
summary: Ingest customer posts or reviews, group themes, summarize sentiment drivers, and recommend actions.
description: Helpful outputs include recurring topics, sample evidence, sentiment patterns, and business insights.
notes: Useful for consumer insights, VOC, and review intelligence demos.

title: Security report generation
summary: Aggregate evidence from findings and configuration data, map issues to controls, and generate a structured report.
description: Helpful outputs include executive summary, findings, severity, and remediation plan.
notes: Useful for cloud security, governance, and audit report demos.
